problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: If Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient is applied to to, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
